_meta.alignment: ASEAN Framework on Digital Data Governance
_meta.verificationNote: Controls are indicative, constructed to illustrate ASEAN data governance compliance patterns. Organizations must verify against official ASEAN framework documents and applicable national laws.

domains.name: Data Classification
domains.description: Data classification standards across ASEAN jurisdictions.

domains.name: Model Contractual Clauses
domains.description: Standardized contractual frameworks for data sharing.

data-classification.name: Cross-Jurisdictional Classification Framework
data-classification.description: Establish a data classification framework that accounts for varying sensitivity levels and regulatory requirements across ASEAN member states.
keyActivities: Map data types to ASEAN jurisdictional requirements
Define classification tiers (public, internal, confidential, restricted)
Align with national data protection laws

data-classification.name: Cross-Border Data Inventory
data-classification.description: Maintain a comprehensive inventory of data assets subject to cross-border transfer, identifying the jurisdictions involved and applicable regulations.
keyActivities: Catalogue data assets by type and jurisdiction
Map data flows across ASEAN borders
Identify applicable regulations per data type
Update inventory upon new data flows

data-classification.name: Regulatory Sensitivity Mapping
data-classification.description: Map data sensitivity classifications to regulatory requirements of each ASEAN jurisdiction where data is processed or stored.
keyActivities: Apply most restrictive classification when in doubt

data-classification.name: ASEAN Data Labelling Standards
data-classification.description: Implement consistent data labelling standards that are recognizable across ASEAN jurisdictions and support automated policy enforcement.

cross-border-transfers.name: Lawful Transfer Mechanism Selection
cross-border-transfers.description: Identify and implement appropriate legal mechanisms for cross-border data transfers based on data type, destination, and applicable regulations.
keyActivities: Assess transfer legal basis per jurisdiction

cross-border-transfers.name: Destination Adequacy Assessment
cross-border-transfers.description: Assess the adequacy of data protection standards in destination countries before authorizing cross-border transfers.
keyActivities: Evaluate destination country data protection laws

cross-border-transfers.name: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
cross-border-transfers.description: Implement technical and organizational safeguards for cross-border transfers including encryption, access controls, and monitoring.
keyActivities: Encrypt data in transit and at rest
Log and audit cross-border data movements

cross-border-transfers.name: Data Localization Compliance
cross-border-transfers.description: Identify and comply with data localization requirements in ASEAN jurisdictions that mandate local storage or processing of certain data types.

cross-border-transfers.name: Data Transfer Impact Assessment
cross-border-transfers.description: Conduct impact assessments for cross-border transfers evaluating risks to data subjects and compliance obligations.

model-contractual-clauses.name: ASEAN Model Contractual Clauses Adoption
model-contractual-clauses.description: Adopt and implement ASEAN Model Contractual Clauses for data sharing agreements between entities in different ASEAN member states.
keyActivities: Adapt clauses to specific data sharing arrangements

model-contractual-clauses.name: Third Country Transfer Clauses
model-contractual-clauses.description: Implement contractual clauses for data transfers to non-ASEAN countries, incorporating equivalent protections.
keyActivities: Specify audit rights and breach notification

model-contractual-clauses.name: Sub-Processor Contractual Controls
model-contractual-clauses.description: Ensure contractual controls flow down to sub-processors involved in cross-border data processing.

model-contractual-clauses.name: Cross-Border Breach Notification
model-contractual-clauses.description: Include contractual obligations for timely cross-border breach notification aligned with the most stringent applicable requirements.

data-protection-standards.name: Privacy by Design Across Jurisdictions
data-protection-standards.description: Implement privacy by design principles that meet the requirements of all ASEAN jurisdictions where data is processed.

data-protection-standards.name: Harmonized Encryption Standards
data-protection-standards.description: Implement encryption standards that meet the highest applicable standard across all relevant ASEAN jurisdictions.

data-protection-standards.name: Cross-Border Data Subject Rights
data-protection-standards.description: Enable data subjects to exercise their rights (access, correction, deletion) regardless of which ASEAN jurisdiction holds their data.

data-protection-standards.name: Multi-Jurisdictional Incident Response
data-protection-standards.description: Coordinate incident response across ASEAN jurisdictions with notification to all applicable regulatory authorities.

regulatory-harmonization.name: ASEAN Regulatory Change Monitoring
regulatory-harmonization.description: Monitor regulatory changes across all relevant ASEAN jurisdictions to maintain compliance with evolving data governance requirements.
keyActivities: Subscribe to regulatory updates per jurisdiction

regulatory-harmonization.name: Multi-Jurisdictional Compliance Mapping
regulatory-harmonization.description: Maintain a compliance mapping that cross-references requirements across ASEAN data protection laws.

regulatory-harmonization.name: ASEAN Data Protection Certification Alignment
regulatory-harmonization.description: Align organizational certifications with ASEAN cross-border data protection certification frameworks where available.
